action.reasoning: Observation: /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test contains test_labels.txt, which the evaluator needs but hardcodes /data/test_labels.txt. Symlinking /data to the real test dir should fix evaluator. Analysis: Creating symlink /data -> /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test will make /data/test.txt, /data/flac/ and /data/test_labels.txt all accessible, satisfying both predict.py and evaluator. Decision: Run ln -s and immediately submit eval with best.pt checkpoint to finally get test EER (1.4h left, zero evals so far).
